common.appTitle: ดึ๋งปุ๊ Idle Game
common.appDescription: An idle adventure with 3 hero classes — clear waves, challenge bosses, and keep upgrading.

panels.upgradeAriaLabel: {name} Level {level}{costState, select, capped { (MAX)} other {, cost {cost} gold}}

welcome.title: Welcome to ดึ๋งปุ๊!
welcome.body: Your hero team charges through enemy waves automatically. Your job is to keep upgrading them so they grow stronger. Let's take a look!

watchFight.title: Let your heroes fight
watchFight.body: Heroes attack enemies on their own. Every kill banks gold, and the bar below fills up toward the boss.

buyUpgrade.title: Spend gold on upgrades
buyUpgrade.body: Try buying one of the upgrades below. The stronger your team, the faster you'll clear the next wave.

castSkill.title: Cast a skill to help out
castSkill.body: Each hero has their own special skill. Tap a skill button when it's ready (no cooldown left) for a big burst of damage!

bossChallenge.title: Challenge the stage boss
bossChallenge.body: Once your team's power is ready, the Challenge Boss button lights up. Tap it to fight the boss and unlock the next stage!

settingsTour.title: Tune your play here
settingsTour.body: Speed up the game, mute/unmute sound, or switch between Thai/English anytime from this row.

outro.title: You're ready!
outro.body: That's the whole core loop: kill → bank gold → upgrade → grow stronger, on repeat. Enjoy the adventure!

swordsman.name: Whirl Slash
swordsman.desc: Spins the blade to hit every foe in range

archer.name: Arrow Rain
archer.desc: Rains arrows across the whole battlefield

mage.name: Meteor
mage.desc: Calls down a meteor strike on the area
